name: Bones Daz
description:
__Height:__ 212 cm (6'11½")
__Affiliations:__ Baroque Works; Bounty Hunters (former); ~!Cross Guild!~
__Devil Fruit:__ Supa Supa no Mi (Dice-Dice Fruit)
__Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia
__Bounty:__ ~!75,000,000!~
Daz Bones is a former bounty hunter who joined the organization Baroque Works and is the highest-ranked male Officer Agent and the strongest under [Crocodile](https://anilist.co/character/2749/Crocodile) himself.  
His codename in the organization is Mr. 1 and he got partnered up with [Miss Doublefinger](https://anilist.co/character/21556/Zara).
He is very stoic and confident and does not hold friendship in high regard. He displays great loyalty to his boss.
Despite his cold-heartedness, he dreamt of becoming a superhero as a child.
~! After the defeat of Crocodile and the subsequent disbandment of Baroque Works he got imprisoned in Impel Down alongside his former boss, from which he escaped during the mass breakout. !~
